sections.description: A complete restaurant menu management system with multiple menus, categories, featured items, dietary badges, photo support, shortcodes, and Google Schema.org structured data.
sections.changelog:
1.5.6

  • Fixed Restaurant Information fields overflowing their box — replaced form-table two-column layout with stacked label-above-input style, inputs now 100% width

1.5.5

  • Settings layout update: Quick Start top-left, Restaurant Info top-right, rcc_ class placeholders

1.5.4

  • Fixed Filter by Menu and shortcode PHP serialization mismatch

1.5.3

  • Settings redesign with Typography class name controls

1.5.2

  • Added [rmm_info] shortcode

1.5.1

  • Fixed plugin slug and update URL

1.5.0

  • Layout shortcode attribute, [rmm_featured_item], typography controls

1.0.0

  • Initial release
